attributes.action: Improve NHS support and care pathways for Functional Neurological Disorder (FND)
attributes.additional_details: We want the Government to improve NHS support for Functional Neurological Disorder (FND) by increasing funding for services and research, introducing consistent care pathways across the UK, improving training and awareness among healthcare professionals, and ensuring patients have timely access to appropriate specialist treatment and support.
attributes.background:
Functional Neurological Disorder (FND) is a serious neurological condition that can cause disabling symptoms including tremors, weakness, chronic pain, fatigue, and mobility problems.

I have personally submitted a detailed report which has already been acknowledged and leads within the NHS,

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Review support for FND sufferers and waiting times for treatment
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/755906
